attempts.strategy: Close D2' by feeding the now-sorry-free pullbackEtaUnitSquare into the IsIso plumbing.
attempts.insight: Closes automatically once pullbackEtaUnitSquare is sorry-free. lean_verify axioms = {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}; no sorryAx. D2' is the armed binary close-or-pivot target for iter-250 — it CLOSED.

next_steps: D2' done. Next irreducible sub-step is D3' (delta-vs-open-immersion base-change square) per STRATEGY A.1.c.sub; then D4' -> RPF.addCommGroup. Terminal Picard-cone counter stays flat ~3-4 iters (chain-depth lag, not churn).

attempts.strategy: Strip the two restrictScalars(1) wrappers by show-into-syntactic-category + rfl (the analogist eps250 headline idiom).
attempts.code_tried: show ... ; (whnf on restrictScalars (𝟙) over sheafification-laden composites)
attempts.lean_error: (deterministic) timeout at `whnf`, maximum number of heartbeats (6400000) has been reached
attempts.insight: CATASTROPHIC. The premise that restrictScalars(𝟙) is absorbed defeq cheaply is FALSE at this term scale — whnf blows >6.4M heartbeats. Dead end; do not repeat.

attempts.strategy: Introduce a propositional rewrite restrictScalarsId_map : (restrictScalars (𝟙 R)).map g = g (:= rfl over abstract g) and strip the wrappers SYNTACTICALLY via rw, avoiding whnf.
attempts.goal_after: clean presheaf goal (u ≫ pf₁.map toSheafify_Y) ≫ pf₂.map (...) = (unitToPushforwardObjUnit φ).val
attempts.insight: The stated-propositionally rfl lemma is essentially free and is THE key to the close — sidesteps the catastrophic whnf.

attempts.strategy: Merge the two pushforward-images and fold to η F, then collapse to unitToPushforwardObjUnit via the closed feeder lemmas.
attempts.code_tried: erw [Category.assoc, ← Functor.map_comp, pullbackSheafifyUnitEtaTriangle f, presheafUnit_comp_map_eta f, epsilonPresheafToSheafUnit f]
attempts.insight: erw is LOAD-BEARING: the leading pushforward image is spelled `pushforward (Hom.toRingCatSheafHom f).hom` (from leftAdjointUniqUnitEta) vs trailing `pushforward φ.hom` (set-local φ); plain rw/simp only [Category.assoc] fail to match at the connecting object and a `show` unifying φ blows heartbeats. erw keyed-defeq matching reassociates tolerantly within maxHeartbeats 3200000.

attempts.strategy: Sectionwise: hom_ext -> hom_ext -> ext r, then close both sides landing on φ.hom.app X.
attempts.code_tried: apply PresheafOfModules.hom_ext; intro X₀; apply ModuleCat.hom_ext; ext r; erw [SheafOfModules.unitToPushforwardObjUnit_val_app_apply, ModuleCat.restrictScalars_η]
attempts.lean_error: failed to synthesize instance / CommRing diamond on (restrictScalars f).obj 𝟙_
attempts.insight: synthInstance does not reduce (restrictScalars f).obj 𝟙_ to the canonical forget₂-carrier instance (a diamond); a letI supplying the CommRing instance on the scalar ring S₀ fixes it. Wrapped in set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false. Step 7 / substep (iii).

attempts.strategy: erw [← unit.naturality] then Functor.id_map; Y-side right triangle on 𝒪_Y; close reading η F off goal.
attempts.code_tried: letI : (pushforward φ').IsRightAdjoint := (pullbackPushforwardAdjunction _).isRightAdjoint; rw [← Category.assoc]; erw [← unit.naturality, Category.assoc, Functor.id_map]; have htri := right_triangle_components (unit Y); refine Eq.trans ?_ (Category.comp_id _); congr 1
attempts.lean_error: earlier: rw/simp [htri] cannot fire (codomain 𝟙_Yp vs (unit Y).val defeq only at non-reducible transparency)
attempts.insight: Need IsRightAdjoint instance for the naturality erw. Read η F off the goal via refine Eq.trans ?_ (Category.comp_id _); congr 1 to avoid OplaxMonoidal re-synthesis. set_option maxHeartbeats 1600000. Substep (ii).

attempts.strategy: State (PresheafOfModules.restrictScalars (𝟙 R)).map g = g propositionally over abstract g, prove by rfl.
attempts.insight: Stating it propositionally over an abstract g makes it a cheap rfl; lets restrictScalars(𝟙) wrappers be stripped by syntactic rw, avoiding the catastrophic whnf. Reusable; record in KB.

findings.blocker: Out of scope this iter (guard-railed, deferred ⊗-inverse lane). Two bridges remain before this sorry closes; documented in informal/exists_tensorObj_inverse.md.
